# Green Light Studios

> Motion graphics studio specializing in logo animation and brand identity for small to medium businesses. Based in Northern Colorado.

Green Light Studios is a solo motion design practice owned and operated by Alex Walsh. The studio focuses on intentional, hand-crafted logo animation and brand motion positioned explicitly against generic AI-generated animation. Primary markets are food and beverage brands, craft breweries, restaurants, and food trucks in Northern Colorado, with national remote reach.

## Services

- Logo Animation (Tier 1 "Ready"): Single animated logo, 5 to 10 seconds, 2 format exports, 2 revisions, 48-hour delivery. Starting at $200.
- Brand Motion Package (Tier 2 "Set"): Branded intro and outro, 1 social looping animation, 2 transitions, 2 revisions, 3 to 5 day delivery. Starting at $500.
- Social Media Motion (Tier 3 "Ignite"): Everything in Set plus 3 to 5 branded Reels and TikTok motion templates, custom animated overlays, full format export pack, 2 revisions, 1 to 3 week delivery. Starting at $1,000.
- Additional revisions: $75 per round.
- Logo redraw fee: $75 (simple) to $150 (complex) when no vector file is provided.

## About

Alex Walsh holds a Bachelor of Fine Arts in 3D Graphics and Animation from the University of Colorado Denver and an After Effects certificate from School of Motion. Production workflow: Adobe After Effects, Adobe Illustrator, Premiere Pro, Procreate, and Procreate Dreams.

## Geography

Primary service area: Fort Collins CO, Greeley CO, Loveland CO, Windsor CO, Longmont CO. Remote work available nationwide and internationally.
